channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Kotlin (Weekly)

item.title: 📝 zenjahid/bKash-Sync (37 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: zenjahid

📝 Repository: zenjahid/bKash-Sync

📄 Descrizione: Real-time bKash SMS transaction monitoring for Android — capture, store, and sync P2P payments to your own Cloudflare backend for automated payment verification.

⭐ Stelle: 37

🍴 Forks: 12

💻 Linguaggio: Kotlin

🏷️ Topics: android bkash cloudflare-workers kotlin p2p-payments payment-verification self-hosted

item.title: 📝 m4xx3d0ut/1337-board (21 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: m4xx3d0ut

📝 Repository: m4xx3d0ut/1337-board

📄 Descrizione: 1337 Board is a desktop-style Android keyboard for terminals, editors, tablets, and power-user text entry. It is inspired by the practical layout ideas in Hacker's Keyboard, but implemented as a modern Android IME with current APIs, custom rendering, and privacy-focused defaults.

⭐ Stelle: 21

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: Kotlin

📜 Licenza: Other

item.title: 📝 stf-ftw/LibAuto (17 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: stf-ftw

📝 Repository: stf-ftw/LibAuto

📄 Descrizione: LibAuto is an experimental Android USB head-unit app for running Android Auto projection on tablets and aftermarket Android head units. It supports wired USB projection, fullscreen video/audio playback, touch and gesture input, media keys, basic vehicle sensor emulation, and resolution options for common car-display layouts.

⭐ Stelle: 17

🍴 Forks: 2

💻 Linguaggio: Kotlin

📜 Licenza: GNU General Public License v3.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-23T22:16:29Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-28T14:39:44Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>
